product: Genie Space redesign and permission management
tagline: New Genie Space UI: Genie now has a redesigned UI for authoring and chats.
what_it_does: New Genie Space UI: Genie now has a redesigned UI for authoring and chats. The new layout has more space for conversations and a reorganized interface for adding and refining instructions. Privileged users can help refine instructions: Users with at least CAN EDIT permissions can now view the source SQL used to generate answers, allowing them to help refine Genie instructions.
why_it_matters: Improved SQL matching in Genie: Genie can now better utilize example SQL statements when user prompts closely match the example SQL.
key_takeaway: New Genie Space UI: Genie now has a redesigned UI for authoring and chats.
